channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Park known for rare gorillas prepares to fight Ebola and protect primates
item.description: Rangers in Virunga National Park are on the front lines, working to contain the virus while facing increased conflict.

item.title: Summer jobs offer major benefits for teens despite tough market
item.description: Finding a summer job is challenging for teens, but the personal rewards are significant.

item.title: Pope Leo states war with Iran does not meet 'just war' criteria
item.description: Pope Leo XIV told journalists that the conflict in Iran does not meet Catholic teaching's definition of a just war.

item.title: Israel reportedly used white phosphorus near Lebanese cities and towns. What is it?
item.description: White phosphorus is not prohibited under international law, but it can cause severe injuries and indiscriminate harm in populated areas.
